name: context-os
description: Unified context suite for Claude Code: knowledge graph (quickstart, ingest, graph health), session analytics (cc-lens dashboard + ccusage), token-efficiency playbook, context audit (graph + waste), and three-mode ingest (auto via hooks, source URLs/Confluence stubs, historical sessions). /cc-lens command turns analysis into paste-prompts or per-project remediation. Bundled lightweight CLI — no external tastematter binary.
